name: Python 3 + PostgreSQL + Node
onCreateCommand: (cp .env.example .env || echo ".env creation failed"); (pipenv install || echo "pipenv install failed"); (bash database.sh || echo "database.sh failed");
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p /workspaces/.codespaces/shared || true; python docs/assets/greeting.py both > /workspaces/.codespaces/shared/first-run-notice.txt || true; npm install
